creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This is what it’s like watching HUNDREDS of drones take off and create art in the night sky! 🌌 Everything is timed to the live classical music and it’s a spectacular open air concert that really does paint the night with light and colour! ad-pr

🗓️ You can join the waitlist on @fever_uk for the next dates of the concert, save this video to remind you to use code EXPLORINGLONDON10 for 10% off your tickets too!
⏳ Duration: 65 mins
👥 All ages welcome @droneart_show 
📍 This particular show was at Kempton Park Racecourse

transcription.text: Tonight's Drone Art Show, please take your seats. Tonight you witness a stunning synthesis of light and sound as drones perform a choreographed dance. He is a fusion of art and motion.
